hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -q '\.tsx$' && bash scripts/lint-scratch.sh "$f" 2>&1 | tail -20 || true; }
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qE 'src/components/(ui|patterns)/.+\.tsx$' && node scripts/generate-component-lookup.mjs 2>&1 | tail -5 || true; }
